zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Luttrell於1236年出生在英國薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德時，他的父親Andrew Luttrell28歲，母親Pernel Mare27歲。他於大約1261年與Margery Fitz Thomas在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1270年在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Luttrell was born in 1236, in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England, his father, Andrew Luttrell, was 28 and his mother, Pernel Mare, was 27. He married Margery Fitz Thomas about 1261, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1270, in Acre, Northern, Israel, at the age of 34, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Luttrell est né en 1236, à East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Andrew Luttrell, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Pernel Mare, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margery Fitz Thomas environ 1261, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1270, à Acre, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Luttrell 1236 in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Luttrell 28 und seine Mutter Pernel Mare 27. Er hat um 1261 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Margery Fitz Thomas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1270 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Israel und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Luttrell è nato il nel 1236 nel East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Andrew Luttrell, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Pernel Mare, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margery Fitz Thomas circa 1261, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1270, nel Acre, Northern, Israele, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Luttrellが1236年にイギリスソメルセトエアスト クアントクスヘドで生まれた時，父Andrew Luttrellは28歳，母Pernel Mareは27歳であった。約1261年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでMargery Fitz Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Luttrell(이)가 1236년 영국 서머세트 이스트 퀄토스헤드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Luttrell(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Pernel Mare(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1261년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Margery Fitz Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Luttrell nasceu em 1236, em East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Andrew Luttrell, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Pernel Mare, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Fitz Thomas aproximadamente 1261, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1270, em Acre, Northern, Israel, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Luttrell родился в 1236 г. в местности эаст куантоксхид, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Andrew Luttrell было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Pernel Mare, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Fitz Thomas около 1261 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1270 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.
